insights.title: Forecast ↓ — Expect App Total Revenue to soften next period — App Total New Subs -22.4%, led by YCP.
insights.body: App Total New Subs -22.4% runs well below its upstream (App Total New User -9.0%, App Total Install +0.2%; Δ -18.0pp). With the 7-day trial lag, expect App Total Revenue to soften next period. The drag is concentrated in YCP (-28.5%); YMK is -17.3%.

insights.title: Lead–lag check — App Total Revenue's -7.9% isn't from acquisition — check churn / pricing / refunds.
insights.body: App Total Revenue 07-22 vs 07-15 = -7.9% runs counter to its 7-day driver App Total New Subs 07-15 vs 07-08 = +6.6% — App Total Revenue's move isn't explained by the prior subs cohort; look at churn, refunds, or pricing rather than acquisition.

insights.title: Funnel conversion — Conversion to New Subs splits by app — YMK softening (-17.3% vs upstream -1.9%).
insights.body: Upstream→New Subs conversion splits by app: YMK -17.3% vs upstream -1.9% (conversion softening); YCP -28.5% vs upstream -2.4% (conversion softening). (Revenue is downstream and lags ~7d — see the lead–lag check.)

insights.title: Broad-based — App Total Revenue down across every app — broad-based, look for a platform-wide cause.
insights.body: App Total Revenue is down across every app (All App -13.0%, YMK -13.1%, YCP -12.9%, YCV -14.4%) — a broad move, so look for a platform-wide cause, not an app-specific one.

insights.title: Country outlier — US is the outlier on App Total Install (+13.1% vs +0.2%).
insights.body: App Total Install · All App: US +13.1% vs all-country +0.2% (Δ +12.9pp; ≈38% of revenue).

insights.title: Data gap — 12 slice(s) missing data — excluded from analysis.
insights.body: 12 slice(s) n/a (missing data): YAT·BR·App Total Revenue, YAT·CA·App Total Revenue, YAT·ES·App Total New Subs, YAT·ES·App Total Revenue ….
